title: The Ravages of Time Episode 14 indonesia, english Sub
description:
English

During the late Eastern Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo overthrew the government, kidnapped the emperor to rule over the princes, and held the prince's relatives captive. After that, Lv Bu's strategy was to burn Luoyang while luring the Allied troops into the urn. The allied forces devise their own special strategy to free the hostages, romance characters take the stage, and the master and hero stage is about to begin.

Indonesia

Selama akhir Dinasti Han Timur, Dong Zhuo menggulingkan pemerintah, menculik kaisar untuk memerintah para pangeran, dan menahan tawanan kerabat pangeran. Setelah itu, strategi Lv Bu adalah membakar Luoyang sambil memancing pasukan Sekutu ke dalam guci. Pasukan sekutu menyusun strategi khusus mereka sendiri untuk membebaskan para sandera, karakter asmara naik ke atas panggung, dan panggung tuan dan pahlawan akan segera dimulai.
